You are a sub-agent porting an external integration.

## Task
Port the existing Aguara security scanner integration from the legacy Python
wrapper (`scripts/legacy-aguara.py`) to the new Go service
(`svc-security/internal/aguara/`).  Add Parry vulnerability scanning as a
secondary integration and wire Repomix for repository analysis context.

## Context
This is a Large-complexity task involving two external tool integrations and
one repository analysis tool.  All three are Tier-2 contextual rules that are
only expanded on-demand.

Required integration rules:
- [`aguara-integration`] — 189-rule security scanner; read the integration guide
- [`parry-integration`] — vulnerability scanning; see auth requirements
- [`repomix-integration`] — repository context tool; configure for the new service

Optionally useful:
- [`e2b-integration`] — sandbox execution (needed if you want to test scanner output)
- [`tero-integration`] — trace evaluation (advanced; only if scan pipeline is instrumented)

Governance rules (always active):
- [`acceptance-criteria`] — define measurable criteria before starting
- [`blast-radius`] — this touches svc-security and two external services
- [`impact-analysis`] — run before applying

## Acceptance Criteria
1. `ls svc-security/internal/aguara/*.go | wc -l` >= 3 (client, models, integration_test)
2. `ls svc-security/internal/parry/*.go | wc -l` >= 2
3. `go build ./svc-security/...` exits 0
4. `go test ./svc-security/... -tags=integration` exits 0
5. `grep -r "legacy-aguara" scripts/ --include="*.py" | wc -l` = 0 (legacy removed)

## HALT Protocol
This task triggers HALT (multi-service, external API contracts).
Output PLAN + SCOPE + RISK before executing.

## Auto-Refine
Retry up to 3 times on build/test failure.  Escalate per [`agent-escalation`].
